pi_items.source: Web query for Niamey coordinates via Wikipedia API confirms lat 13.51N, lon 2.11E.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically injected WKB geometries in a sqlite3 GeoPackage database. The target layer 'highway_segments' and the feature 'Trans-African Hwy 2' are manually constructed via setup scripts. The exact geometry start and end points decoded from the hex blob closely align with the Lagos and Algiers coordinates listed in the metadata. Importantly, although the task description directs the user to use the 'Niamey' capital city marker for alignment in the 'world_capitals' layer, querying the database confirms that Niamey (and Niger) are entirely absent from the dataset. The agent must independently determine the location of Niamey (approximately 13.51N, 2.11E) to succeed, contradicting the description's claim of an existing reference point.
